description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house with a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a geometric layout. The exterior is primarily composed of light gray and white materials, with large glass windows providing ample natural light. A spacious patio surrounds the house, including a swimming pool and several outdoor lounge areas with umbrellas and seating. The roof is flat and slightly offset, creating a layered visual effect. The house appears to have a single story with an open-plan layout, and the main entrance is subtly integrated into the facade. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a patio featuring a pool and outdoor seating. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with light gray and white tones.
description_view_0: This view highlights the pool area, outdoor lounge chairs, and the layered flat roof structure.
description_view_1: The rear of the house is visible, showing a more enclosed facade with fewer windows and a solid wall.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the extended patio space and the clean, geometric lines of the house.
description_view_3: The front view showcases the main entrance, large windows, pool, and outdoor seating under umbrellas.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with flush door, no steps, integrated into facade, and sheltered by roof overhang
